slots.text: (masterpiece, 8k, photorealistic) wide angle perspective, in the middle of the courtroom of a king's castle, the witcher Geralt with silver hair and two longswords over his right shoulder, in chainmail with a wolf medallion, leans against a wall watching the crowd, to include the king, queen, and beautiful buxom princess who are holding court. Warm light, cinematic, epic, fantasy. Natural facial proportions.
slots.negative: blurry, low resolution, bad anatomy, mishapen, extra limbs, weird angles, weird bodies, cgi, cartoon, anime, crossed eyes
